category_sources: Official GitHub README describes fwupd as a system daemon for session software to update firmware.
display_name_sources: Official fwupd documentation site and GitHub repository identify the project as fwupd.
docs_sources: Official GitHub repository README is an official documentation fallback.
Official fwupd.github.io site is the fwupd documentation site with user and developer docs.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/fwupd/fwupd, so repo is returned as null per instructions.
tags_sources: Official fwupd documentation covers end-user manual pages and developer documentation.
